hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git (commit|merge)'; then cd /Users/citius/GolandProjects/checker-github && go vet ./... && go build ./cmd/app ./cmd/dbcheck ./cmd/migrate-config || { echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"go vet or go build failed — fix compilation errors before committing"}'; exit 0; }; fi
